chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1362 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 23.10.2025 Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri Assistant A.G Sindh a/w SIP Naroo Mal of P.S A-Section Tando Allahyar, ASI Allah Bachayo Khaskheli of PS Badin Mr. Shahid Ahmed Shaikh, Additional P.G Sindh *** No one is present on behalf of the petitioners. At the very outset learned Additional A.G submits copy of report on behalf of the Investigation Officer, which reveals that the impugned FIR has been recommended for disposal under C-class. Learned Additional A.G and Additional P.G submit that in view of the above development this petition has served its purpose and has become infructuous. In view of the above, this petition stands disposed, however, the official respondents are directed to provide legal protection to the petitioners, as and when approach is made in this regard. Let a copy of this order be sent by fax to SSPs concerned for compliance. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
